Recipes

Teresa's banana bread

Based on this recipe

ingredients

  • 2 sticks softened butter or 1 cup oil
    • To soften the butter, set it out until reaches approximately room temperature or microwave it for 20-30 seconds
  • ~2.25 cups sugar
    • If the bananas are very very mushy, then they'll be extra watery when mashed, so use white sugar
    • Otherwise (or if you like more moist banana bread), use brown sugar
  • 4 eggs
  • 6-8 bananas, mashed
    • Making banana bread is a great way to reduce Banana Lounge food waste 😉
    • The more bananas you use, the less bread-y (dry) and more cake-y (moist) your banana bread will be
  • 2 tsps baking powder
  • 2 tsps baking soda
  • 2 tsps salt
  • 3-4 tbps cinnamon
  • 1-2 tsp vanilla extract
  • 4 cups flour
  • (optional) a metric ton of chocolate chips

instructions

  1. Combine ingredients in the order listed
  2. Pour into a 9"x13" casserole dish and bake at 325° for ~65 min or at 350° for ~30 min a. If you're using cupcake pans or two loaf pans, then your bake time will be slightly less b. You'll know when it's done if you stick in a toothpick or chopstick and it comes out clean (i.e., no raw banana bread goop attached)
  3. Announce your banana bread by emailing out to hall and wait for the Beasties to descend 😋
